duas.translationEn: In Your Name, O Allah, I die and I live.

duas.arabicText: سُبْحَانَ الَّذِي سَخَّرَ لَنَا هَٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لَهُ مُقْرِنِينَ
duas.transliteration: Subhanal-lathee sakhkhara lana hatha wa ma kunna lahu muqrineen
duas.translationAr: سبحان الذي سخر لنا هذا وما كنا له مقرنين
duas.translationEn: Glory be to Him Who has subjected this to us, and we could never have it (by our efforts).
In the name of Allah and with the blessings of Allah.

duas.arabicText: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ الْعَظِيمُ الْحَلِيمُ، لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
duas.transliteration: La ilaha illallahu al-Azeem al-Haleem, la ilaha illallahu Rabbul Arsh al-Azeem
duas.translationAr: لا إله إلا الله العظيم الحليم، لا إله إلا الله رب العرش العظيم
duas.translationEn: None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, the Incomparably Great, the Forbearing. None has the right to be worshipped except Allah, the Lord of the Mighty Throne.

duas.arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ
duas.transliteration: Allahumma anta Rabbi la ilaha illa anta, khalaqtani wa ana abduk
duas.translationAr: اللهم أنت ربي لا إله إلا أنت، خلقتني وأنا عبدك
duas.translationEn: O Allah, You are my Lord, none has the right to be worshipped except You. You created me and I am Your servant.

duas.arabicText: أَعُوذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ اللَّهِ التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
duas.transliteration: A'udhu bi kalimatillahit tammati min sharri ma khalaq
duas.translationAr: أعوذ بكلمات الله التامات من شر ما خلق
duas.translationEn: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
